title: SuperSimpleNet
description: Anomaly detection model with flexible training regime (unsupervised, weakly supervised, fully supervised, mixed supervision)

manifest.description: The dataset manifest should be a file containing a JSON object with either a single attribute 'data', or attributes 'train' and 'test', each of which should be a list of objects with properties 'label' (with value being either 'normal' or 'abnormal'), 'image_path' and 'mask_path' (their values should be file paths, relative to the manifest file). Attributes mask_path or label may be omitted, but this will impact which training regime is used.

weights.description: Path to saved model (file that can be loaded with torch.load()).

backbone_weights.description: Weights used for backbone. Note: if using different weights, make sure to use _V1 version.

bad.description: Whether to add noise to already anomalous regions

epochs.description: Duration of training (1 epoch == 1 pass through the dataset).

gamma.description: Parameter for learning rate decay (MultiStepLR - for each milestone, multiply lr with gamma).

eval_step_size.description: Number of steps beween each evaluation.
